text: The RAPIDS cuDF library provides GPU-accelerated dataframe operations that dramatically reduce the time required for large-scale data processing tasks. By offloading computation to the GPU, pipelines that previously took hours can complete in minutes, making iterative experimentation far more practical for data science teams working with datasets in the tens of gigabytes range.

Deduplication is a critical step in dataset curation, particularly for large web-crawled corpora where the same content may appear across thousands of pages. Exact deduplication removes byte-identical documents, while fuzzy deduplication using MinHash locality-sensitive hashing catches near-duplicate passages that differ only in whitespace, punctuation, or minor edits.
